reasoning_model_1: Model 1 accurately speaks the required text '请注意，演出即将开始。' without any errors or hallucinations. The voice used is a deep, resonant male voice, which perfectly aligns with the instruction '请用低音说' (Please speak in a low pitch/bass). Throughout the clip (0:00-0:03), the pitch remains consistently low and stable, creating a solemn and formal atmosphere suitable for a pre-performance announcement. The prosody is natural and steady.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 fails significantly on multiple fronts. First, regarding Content Accuracy, it does not stop at the required text. After saying '请注意，演出即将开始', it continues to generate and read a long narrative description ('低沉的嗓音缓缓铺开...'), which is a severe hallucination/instruction following failure. Second, regarding the Core Feature '音高' (Pitch), the model uses a relatively high-pitched, bright female/youthful voice instead of the requested '低音' (low pitch/bass). It describes a low voice in the hallucinated text but fails to enact it vocally. Due to the completely incorrect pitch and the significant content hallucination, this model receives the lowest score.
model_comparison: Model 1 followed all instructions perfectly: the content was exact, and the paralinguistic feature (low pitch) was implemented effectively using a deep male voice. Model 2 failed completely; it used a high-pitched voice (opposite of the prompt) and hallucinated a large amount of extra text. Therefore, Model 1 is the clear winner.
